title: justicia cuzcoensis
intro: Justicia cuzcoensis, also known as the Cuzco snail flower or Peruvian snail flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Justicia cuzcoensis include its potential use in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to support immune function and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Justicia cuzcoensis can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by combining the plant with other herbs to create a tincture or salve.
